movie.actors: Larry the Cable Guy, Brian Stepanek, Anthony Carelli, Kennedi Clements
movie.plot: Larry's daughter wants only one thing for Christmas, a talking bear. His daughter's stepdad intends to make sure that Larry can't get one.
movie.title: Jingle All the Way 2
movie.writer: Randy Kornfield (based on "Jingle All the Way" written by), Stephen Mazur
